verdict_summary: Identical failure to #764 — ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on /ai/v2/render-generation persists; outline card #1 empty (no Korean warning rendered). h2_end_stream config propagation did NOT resolve the issue at runtime.

evidence.outline_card_1_title: (empty - card shows only number '1' with no title or body)
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request | POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR | Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to fetch (ai.api.gamma.app) at e.s.generate.traceparent

recommendation: Re-investigate config propagation. Despite etap.log audit showing h2_end_stream=1 active at 18:16:23, runtime behavior on gamma is identical to pre-fix #764 state. Possible causes: (1) browser-side connection pool still using stale H2 session despite hard reload (try fully closing Chrome / new profile / different machine); (2) etapd not reading updated config field for THIS specific gamma block path (verify with packet capture against actual /ai/v2/render-generation flow); (3) deeper protocol layer issue beyond end_stream flag — render-generation pass-through may need separate fix. Suggest dev: tcpdump on gamma block during a fresh test to confirm wire-level frames have end_stream=1; if frames look correct, the bug is downstream in pass-through, not config.
notes: Pre-test: hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) performed twice on gamma.app/create/generate. MessagePort filter cleared from console. Test ran on existing Chrome session (logged in as 장희 최's Workspace). Same Chrome session that #764 used — incognito/fresh profile NOT attempted (could be relevant if stale H2 connection pooled). Observed errors fired within ~5s of clicking 개요 생성 button; waited additional 25s with no recovery. Outline panel shows skeleton card '1' with empty body, no warning, no RRN content (so no S2 regression — RRN content absent because nothing rendered at all).
